_comment_: Block I1 of the approved system-wide plan (~/.claude/plans/rate-this-plan-zesty-tiger.md). Mutation testing scoped to the pure modules with the strongest test coverage — same modules covered by Block I4's property-based tests. Runs periodically (manual trigger via `npm run mutation`); not gated per-PR because runtime is too long for the dev loop. Threshold is intentionally conservative on the first cut — bumping the high threshold higher requires improving test quality.
